name: @clearline/data-access-budgets
description: Budget management data-access layer for clearline-web: React Query hooks over /api/budgets (the department overview gauges and a department's period history) plus the set-budget mutation behind US-CW-019. Surfaces the Controller-only 403 as a typed error and the 422 invalid-amount rejection to the form. No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-013 (US-CW-019 Department Budget Management).
